The complete planning subject is the seven manifest files. No Rust, Cargo, 05 decomposition, HCM-0.5, historical handoff/dispatch, or unrelated file is in the subject. allowed_scope: Read and replay every subject_manifest entry against the live repository, then review the complete seven-file planning/control-pack subject read-only.
Use git diff for the four tracked control-pack files and read the three new packet files in full; compare them to the frozen HCM-0.4 baseline and exact authority sections.
Run read-only Markdown, mapping, scope, archive, handoff, and Git checks as needed.
non_goals: No edits, commits, new dispatches, handoff records, ledger writes, or user task hops by the reviewer.
No decomposition or edit of 05-contracts-schemas-and-gates.md in this planning review.
No Rust, Cargo, runtime, CLI, Tauri, Substrate, SDK/public API, schema-version, proof-promotion, HCM-0.5, shipped-default, or unrelated work.
Do not approve based on the parent verification summary; independently judge the exact subject and baseline.
tasks: Replay the sorted path/SHA-256 manifest and confirm it binds the complete seven-file planning/control-pack candidate.
Review HCM-0.9 sequence after HCM-0.4 and before HCM-0.5, dependencies, objective, outputs, exact exit gate, non-goals, and execution review-budget stop.
Review whether the proposed eleven-leaf topology is focused, contiguous, independently executable, and maps every frozen H2 section exactly once without semantic mixing or omissions.

Review canonical ownership, stable-index responsibilities, all-heading historical-anchor behavior, immutable-history posture, and exact orchestration/dispatch-manifest/proof/handoff leaf-selection rules.

Review zero-semantic-delta proof mechanics, baseline identity, mapping/fence/example/link/anchor/schema/manifest/handoff/history/scope validation, rollback, and stop behavior for mechanical executability.

Review SPEC.md, plan.md, and todo.md for internal consistency, task dependency order, bounded file sets, exact commands, acceptance criteria, and no decomposition or HCM-0.5 activation in this session.
Confirm control-pack registration does not misrepresent HCM-0.9 as executed, alter 05 authority, promote runtime proof, or widen unrelated scope.

Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit. Each actionable finding must include severity, exact file/line, violated contract/invariant/gate, why it is wrong, smallest valid remediation, and missing verification. Return CLEAN only when no actionable finding remains.
